technology.title: Thousands of people are selling their identities to train AI – but at what cost?
technology.summary: Gig AI trainers worldwide are selling moments of their lives, including calls and texts, to AI companies for quick cash One morning last year, Jacobus Louw set out on his daily neighborhood walk to feed the seagulls he finds along the way. Except this time, he recorded several videos of his feet and the view as he walked on the pavement. The video earned him $14, about 10 times the country’s minimum wage, or for Louw, a 27-year-old based in Cape Town, South Africa, half a week’s worth of groceries. The video was for an “Urban Navigation” task Louw found on Kled AI, an app that pays contributors for uploading their data, such as videos and photos, to train artificial intelligence models. In a couple of weeks, Louw made $50 by uploading pictures and videos of his everyday life. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Gig AI trainers worldwide are selling moments of their lives, including calls and texts, to AI companies for quick cash One morning last year, Jacobus Louw set out on his daily neighborhood walk to feed the seagulls he finds along the way. Except this time, he recorded several videos of his feet and the view as he walked on the pavement. The video earned him $14, about 10 times the country’s minimum wage, or for Louw, a 27-year-old based in Cape Town, South Africa, half a week’s worth of groceries. The video was for an “Urban Navigation” task Louw found on Kled AI, an app that pays contributors for uploading their data, such as videos and photos, to train artificial intelligence models. In a couple of weeks, Louw made $50 by uploading pictures and videos of his everyday life. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 越來越多的人透過出售個人生活片段來賺取快錢，以協助訓練人工智慧模型，這引發了對個人隱私和倫理的討論。
briefing.background: 隨著人工智慧技術的迅速發展，對於訓練數據的需求日益增加。許多AI公司開始尋求多樣化的數據來源，這促使一些人將自己的生活片段，如視頻和照片，出售給這些公司。這種趨勢在發展中國家尤為明顯，因為當地的經濟條件使得這種短期收入變得吸引人。然而，這也引發了對個人隱私和數據安全的擔憂。
briefing.analysis: 這一現象的興起反映了經濟壓力與科技發展之間的矛盾。一方面，參與者可以通過出售個人數據獲得額外收入；另一方面，這樣的行為可能會導致個人隱私被侵犯，並且未來的數據使用方式仍不明朗。AI公司則可能面臨道德責任的挑戰，因為他們需要平衡數據需求與用戶的隱私權益。未來，隨著法律和倫理標準的建立，這一市場可能會出現變化。

supporting_titles: Hargreaves Lansdown says IT issues which affected thousands are over

technology.title: Wimbledon tennis tournament to introduce video review technology - Reuters
technology.summary: Wimbledon tennis tournament to introduce video review technology Reuters

briefing.news_focus: Wimbledon tennis tournament to introduce video review technology Reuters
briefing.news_focus_zh: 溫布頓網球錦標賽將引入視頻回顧技術，以提升比賽的公正性和準確性，這一決策標誌著傳統體育賽事在科技應用上的進一步融合。
briefing.background: 隨著科技的進步，許多體育賽事已經開始採用視頻回顧技術來協助裁判做出更準確的判決。溫布頓作為歷史悠久的網球賽事，其引入此技術反映了對於比賽公正性和觀眾體驗的重視。這一變革也與其他網球賽事如澳大利亞公開賽和美國公開賽的做法相呼應，顯示出網球界對於科技的逐漸接受。
briefing.analysis: 引入視頻回顧技術將有助於減少裁判錯誤，提升比賽的公信力，對選手和觀眾均有正面影響。然而，部分傳統主義者可能會對此改變持保留態度，認為這會影響比賽的流暢性。此外，技術的引入也可能引發關於成本和執行的討論，特別是在如何平衡技術使用與賽事傳統之間的矛盾。

technology.title: Fire experts ‘kept awake’ over growing hazard of lithium-ion batteries
technology.summary: Fire service warns ubiquity of batteries in everyday products is outpacing public understanding and safety regulations Lithium-ion batteries represent a new technological hazard that one fire science expert has said keeps him awake at night, as fire service chiefs warn the ubiquity of the batteries in everyday products is outpacing public understanding and safety regulations. The blaze that devastated a historic building in Glasgow and resulted in the closure of Central Station , Scotland’s largest rail interchange, is believed to have started in a shop selling vapes, which are powered by lithium-ion batteries. Glasgow’s Central Station has since reopened. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Fire service warns ubiquity of batteries in everyday products is outpacing public understanding and safety regulations Lithium-ion batteries represent a new technological hazard that one fire science expert has said keeps him awake at night, as fire service chiefs warn the ubiquity of the batteries in everyday products is outpacing public understanding and safety regulations. The blaze that devastated a historic building in Glasgow and resulted in the closure of Central Station , Scotland’s largest rail interchange, is believed to have started in a shop selling vapes, which are powered by lithium-ion batteries. Glasgow’s Central Station has since reopened. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 隨著鋰離子電池在日常產品中的普及，消防專家警告其潛在火災危險超過了公眾的理解與安全規範。最近在格拉斯哥的一場火災被認為與鋰離子電池有關，這引發了對相關安全措施的關注。
briefing.background: 鋰離子電池因其高能量密度和長壽命而廣泛應用於各類電子產品中，包括手機、電動車及電子煙等。然而，這些電池在過熱、短路或損壞時可能引發火災，且目前相關的安全規範尚未跟上其快速增長的使用率。隨著電池技術的進步，對其安全性和公共認知的需求愈發迫切。
briefing.analysis: 消防專家對鋰離子電池的安全性表示擔憂，顯示出產業與公共安全之間的矛盾。消防部門可能需要加強對電池火災的應對措施，而生產商則需承擔更多的責任以確保產品安全。此外，政府可能需要制定更嚴格的規範來保護消費者，這將影響電池市場的發展方向及成本結構。各方在安全與創新之間的平衡將成為未來的重要議題。

politics.title: Trump threatens to send ICE to airports on Monday amid DHS funding standoff
politics.summary: President attacks ‘Radical Left Democrats’ after homeland security funding bill again sinks in Senate Sign up for the Breaking News US email to get newsletter alerts in your inbox Donald Trump threatened on Saturday to deploy federal immigration agents to US airports on Monday if Democrats do not agree to measures aimed at strengthening security and immigration enforcement. “If the Radical Left Democrats don’t immediately sign an agreement to let our Country, in particular, our Airports, be FREE and SAFE again, I will move our brilliant and patriotic ICE Agents to the Airports,” Trump said in a Truth Social post. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus_zh: 特朗普威脅若民主黨不達成國土安全資金協議，將於週一派遣移民執法局（ICE）至美國機場，強調加強安全與移民執法的重要性。
briefing.background: 美國國土安全部的資金問題一直是兩黨爭論的焦點，特別是在移民政策上。特朗普政府在任內推動嚴格的移民政策，並多次利用移民問題作為政治籌碼。當前，民主黨與共和黨在國土安全資金的分配上存在重大分歧，導致相關法案在參議院未能通過，進一步加劇了政治對立。
briefing.analysis: 特朗普的威脅反映出他對民主黨施加壓力的策略，意在激化選民對移民問題的關注。對於支持強硬移民政策的選民而言，這一舉措可能增強其支持度。然而，民主黨則可能將此視為政治操弄，進一步鞏固其反對特朗普的立場。若特朗普真的派遣ICE至機場，可能引發民眾的反彈與抗議，並對機場運營造成影響，進一步加深社會分裂。

supporting_titles: Trump threatens to send ICE into airports unless funding deal reached

politics.title: Australia news live: Tropical Cyclone Narelle crosses NT coast as category three system
politics.summary: Weakening system expected to bring severe weather across parts of NT already saturated from recent rains and flooding. Follow live updates Get our breaking news email , free app or daily news podcast Petrol stations were facing a huge spike in demand – 100% increase in a few days, which Chris Bowen said was “understandable and expected”. We’ve seen a massive increase in demand, accompanied by that increase in regional areas. Obviously, the regional areas are where the supply chain is the hardest to manage. It takes longer to get from Geelong and Brisbane to the various regional areas. You’ve also got lots of rural suppliers, distributors and service stations working on very tight margins and not always able to access fuel that’s available. It’s a matter of the refineries seeing some supply problems with their crude oil, which is then impacting on their ability to deliver to their customers, including Australia, but not exclusively Australia. I’ve always been clear, we’re in an uncertain environment. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Weakening system expected to bring severe weather across parts of NT already saturated from recent rains and flooding. Follow live updates Get our breaking news email , free app or daily news podcast Petrol stations were facing a huge spike in demand – 100% increase in a few days, which Chris Bowen said was “understandable and expected”. We’ve seen a massive increase in demand, accompanied by that increase in regional areas. Obviously, the regional areas are where the supply chain is the hardest to manage. It takes longer to get from Geelong and Brisbane to the various regional areas. You’ve also got lots of rural suppliers, distributors and service stations working on very tight margins and not always able to access fuel that’s available. It’s a matter of the refineries seeing some supply problems with their crude oil, which is then impacting on their ability to deliver to their customers, including Australia, but not exclusively Australia. I’ve always been clear, we’re in an uncertain environment. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 熱帶氣旋納雷爾（Narelle）以三級風暴的強度襲擊澳大利亞北部地區，預計將帶來嚴重天氣，尤其是已經因近期降雨和洪水而飽和的北領地。汽油需求大幅上升，部分地區的供應鏈面臨挑戰。
briefing.background: 熱帶氣旋在澳大利亞北部地區的頻繁發生，與氣候變遷及季風模式變化有關。近期的降雨和洪水使得北領地的土壤水分過飽和，進一步加劇了氣旋的影響。此外，汽油需求的激增反映了當地對能源供應的依賴，尤其是在自然災害期間，供應鏈的脆弱性顯露無遺。
briefing.analysis: 此次氣旋對當地居民和經濟活動造成直接影響，尤其是汽油需求的急劇上升使得供應鏈面臨壓力。政府和能源公司需迅速應對，以確保燃料供應穩定。地區供應商在緊縮的利潤空間內運作，可能導致價格上漲，進一步影響消費者。此事件也可能促使政府重新評估應對自然災害的政策及基礎設施投資。

politics.title: Anger grows among UK ministers amid fears Iran war could jeopardise Britain’s fragile finances
politics.summary: Some in cabinet in despair over possible impact of war begun by Donald Trump, who branded Nato allies ‘cowards’ Middle East crisis – live updates Donald Trump has branded the UK and other Nato allies “cowards” as anger grows among cabinet ministers that his war in Iran could jeopardise Britain’s fragile finances. Senior members of the UK government are in despair about the potential effects on the economy, with experts warning of higher energy prices and increased mortgage and borrowing costs. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Some in cabinet in despair over possible impact of war begun by Donald Trump, who branded Nato allies ‘cowards’ Middle East crisis – live updates Donald Trump has branded the UK and other Nato allies “cowards” as anger grows among cabinet ministers that his war in Iran could jeopardise Britain’s fragile finances. Senior members of the UK government are in despair about the potential effects on the economy, with experts warning of higher energy prices and increased mortgage and borrowing costs. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 英國內閣成員對於特朗普發起的伊朗戰爭感到憤怒，擔心此戰爭將對英國脆弱的經濟造成影響，特別是能源價格上漲及借貸成本增加的風險。
briefing.background: 英國的經濟在脫歐後面臨重重挑戰，特別是在通脹和能源價格上漲的背景下。特朗普的外交政策及其對伊朗的軍事行動引發了英國政府的擔憂，因為這可能進一步加劇全球能源市場的不穩定性，影響英國的經濟復甦。英國政府在面對內部經濟壓力的同時，還需應對外部地緣政治的挑戰，這使得政策制定變得更加複雜。
briefing.analysis: 此事件凸顯了英國政府內部對於特朗普政策的分歧，部分內閣成員對於美國的軍事行動表示強烈不滿，擔心其對英國經濟的潛在影響。能源價格的上漲可能導致民眾生活成本增加，進一步影響消費信心。此外，若經濟狀況惡化，將對政府的財政政策造成壓力，可能引發更大的政治爭議。各方可能會要求政府重新評估與美國的同盟關係及其對外政策。

economy.title: BoE delivers message Britons don’t want to hear as inflation – and rates – look set to rise
economy.summary: Decision to hold interest rates is backed by gloomy assessment of economy as Iran war pushes up oil prices Bank of England holds interest rates at 3.75% Business live – latest updates The US-Israel attack on Iran has already driven prices higher and not just at the petrol pumps, the Bank of England said on Thursday in a gloomy assessment of the UK’s economic outlook. An inflation rate that was on track to fall from 3% to the Bank’s 2% target in the coming months is now expected to rise to 3.5%. That is one probable impact of the US and Israel’s war on Iran. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Decision to hold interest rates is backed by gloomy assessment of economy as Iran war pushes up oil prices Bank of England holds interest rates at 3.75% Business live – latest updates The US-Israel attack on Iran has already driven prices higher and not just at the petrol pumps, the Bank of England said on Thursday in a gloomy assessment of the UK’s economic outlook. An inflation rate that was on track to fall from 3% to the Bank’s 2% target in the coming months is now expected to rise to 3.5%. That is one probable impact of the US and Israel’s war on Iran. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 英國央行決定維持利率在3.75%，並對經濟前景發出悲觀評估，指出因美國與以色列對伊朗的攻擊，油價上漲將導致通脹率從預期的3%上升至3.5%。
briefing.background: 英國央行的利率政策受到全球經濟環境影響，特別是地緣政治事件如美國與以色列對伊朗的軍事行動，這使得油價上漲，進而影響通脹預測。此前，英國的通脹率已顯示出下降趨勢，但此事件的發生可能使央行不得不重新評估其貨幣政策，以應對不斷上升的物價壓力。
briefing.analysis: 英國央行的決策反映出對經濟增長的擔憂，尤其是在全球油價波動的背景下。對於消費者而言，通脹上升將削弱購買力，可能導致生活成本危機。企業則可能面臨更高的運營成本，影響盈利能力。政府與央行需在控制通脹與促進經濟增長之間找到平衡，未來可能需要考慮調整利率以應對持續的經濟壓力。

supporting_titles: US holds interest rates as Iran war triggers inflation fears

Senior members of the UK government are in despair about the potential effects on the economy, with experts warning of higher energy prices and increased mortgage and borrowing costs. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus_zh: 英國內閣成員對於特朗普在伊朗發動的戰爭感到憤怒，擔心此舉將對英國脆弱的經濟造成影響，專家預測能源價格上漲及借貸成本增加。
briefing.background: 英國的經濟在脫歐後面臨多重挑戰，包括通脹上升和市場不穩定。隨著全球地緣政治緊張局勢加劇，特別是中東地區的衝突，英國的能源依賴性使其經濟更易受到外部衝擊。特朗普的言論和行動可能使英國在國際舞台上的立場更加脆弱，進一步影響其經濟穩定性。
briefing.analysis: 英國政府內部對特朗普的行動存在分歧，部分內閣成員擔心戰爭可能導致能源價格飆升，進而影響家庭財務狀況和經濟增長。這可能使得政府面臨更大的財政壓力，尤其是在借貸成本上升的情況下。另一方面，特朗普的強硬立場可能使英國在與美國的外交關係中處於不利地位，進一步加劇內部的政治緊張。

supporting_titles: Russia, China and the US – the global winners and losers of the Iran war

economy.title: G7 ready to act to protect global energy supplies, backs Hormuz Strait security - Reuters
economy.summary: G7 ready to act to protect global energy supplies, backs Hormuz Strait security Reuters

briefing.news_focus: G7 ready to act to protect global energy supplies, backs Hormuz Strait security Reuters
briefing.news_focus_zh: 七大工業國集團（G7）準備採取行動以保護全球能源供應，並支持霍爾木茲海峽的安全，顯示出對於能源安全的高度重視。
briefing.background: 霍爾木茲海峽是全球重要的能源運輸通道，約20%的石油貿易經此地進行。隨著地緣政治緊張局勢加劇，特別是伊朗與西方國家的關係緊張，G7國家對於海峽安全的關注愈發上升。過去幾年，該地區的衝突與海盜行為增加，促使各國重新評估其能源供應鏈的安全性與穩定性。
briefing.analysis: G7的行動意在強化全球能源供應的穩定性，這對於依賴中東石油的國家尤為重要。美國及其盟友希望透過軍事與外交手段來遏制潛在的威脅，特別是來自伊朗的挑戰。然而，這也可能引發伊朗及其支持者的反制措施，進一步加劇地區緊張局勢。各方的立場差異可能導致未來的衝突升級，並影響全球能源市場的價格與供應。

supporting_titles: China has been preparing for a global energy crisis for years. It is paying off now
The Iran war is causing a global energy crisis - can China withstand it?

theme_of_day: 今日新聞的整體脈絡圍繞著科技進步與全球政治、經濟局勢的交互影響。科技版面中，個人資料的出售與鋰離子電池的安全問題引發對倫理與公共安全的深思，這與政治版面上因伊朗戰爭引發的經濟不安密切相關。英國內閣對於能源價格上漲的擔憂，進一步與經濟版面中英國央行對通脹上升的預測形成呼應，顯示出當前局勢對全球市場的潛在影響。
